sentences.arabic: تَمْتَازُ الْمُدُنُ التَّارِيخِيَّةُ بِطَابَعٍ مِعْمَارِيٍّ فَرِيدٍ يَحْكِي قِصَصَ الْأُمَمِ.
sentences.translation: Historijski gradovi se odlikuju jedinstvenim arhitektonskim karakterom koji priča priče o narodima.
sentences.translationEn: Historical cities are characterized by a unique architectural character that tells the stories of nations.

sentences.arabic: مِمَّا يَجْعَلُ التَّجَوُّلَ فِي أَزِقَّتِهَا رِحْلَةً عَبْرَ الزَّمَنِ لَا تُنْسَى أَبَدًا.
sentences.translation: To čini šetnju njihovim uličicama nezaboravnim putovanjem kroz vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: This makes wandering through their alleys an unforgettable journey through time.

sentences.arabic: لَوْ زُرْتَ تِلْكَ الْحَوَاضِرَ الْعَرِيقَةَ، لَوَجَدْتَ أَنَّ كُلَّ حَجَرٍ فِيهَا يَنْطِقُ بِعَظَمَةِ الْأَجْدَادِ.
sentences.translation: Da posjetite te drevne metropole, otkrili biste da svaki kamen u njima govori o veličini predaka.
sentences.translationEn: If you visited those ancient metropolises, you would find that every stone within them speaks of the greatness of ancestors.

sentences.arabic: بَيْنَمَا تَمْتَزِجُ الْأَسْوَاقُ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةُ بِصَخَبِ الْحَيَاةِ الْيَوْمِيَّةِ الْمُعَاصِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: U međuvremenu, tradicionalne tržnice se miješaju s bukom savremenog svakodnevnog života.
sentences.translationEn: Meanwhile, traditional markets blend with the bustle of contemporary daily life.

sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ الْحِفَاظُ عَلَى هَذِهِ الْمَعَالِمِ الْأَثَرِيَّةِ وَاجِبًا وَطَنِيًّا وَإِنْسَانِيًّا.
sentences.translation: Očuvanje ovih arheoloških znamenitosti smatra se nacionalnom i ljudskom obavezom.
sentences.translationEn: Preserving these archaeological landmarks is considered a national and human duty.

sentences.arabic: حَيْثُ تُصَنَّفُ الْعَدِيدُ مِنْهَا ضِمْنَ قَائِمَةِ التُّرَاثِ الْعَالَمِيِّ لِقِيمَتِهَا الْفَنِّيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Mnoge od njih su klasifikovane na listu svjetske baštine zbog svoje umjetničke vrijednosti.
sentences.translationEn: Many of them are classified within the World Heritage List for their artistic value.

sentences.arabic: وَيَجِبُ التَّنْوِيهُ إِلَى أَنَّ الِاسْتِكْشَافَ الْحَضَرِيَّ يَتَطَلَّبُ خَرَائِطَ طُوبُوغْرَافِيَّةً دَقِيقَةً.
sentences.translation: Treba napomenuti da urbano istraživanje zahtijeva precizne topografske karte.
sentences.translationEn: It should be noted that urban exploration requires precise topographical maps.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا يَحْتَاجُ السَّائِحُ إِلَى أَدِلَّةٍ سِيَاحِيَّةٍ مُتَخَصِّصَةٍ لِفَهْمِ التَّارِيخِ.
sentences.translation: Također, turisti su potrebni specijalizovani turistički vodiči kako bi razumjeli historiju.
sentences.translationEn: Additionally, the tourist needs specialized tour guides to understand the history.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الْإِقَامَةَ فِي دُورِ الضِّيَافَةِ الْمُرَمَّمَةِ تُوَفِّرُ تَجْرِبَةً غَامِرَةً لِلْغَايَةِ.
sentences.translation: Boravak u renoviranim pansionima pruža veoma impresivno iskustvo.
sentences.translationEn: Staying in restored guest houses provides a very immersive experience.

sentences.arabic: فَهِيَ تَرْبِطُ الزَّائِرَ بِجُذُورِ الْمَكَانِ وَأَصَالَتِهِ الْقَدِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: To povezuje posjetitelja s korijenima mjesta i njegovom drevnom autentičnošću.
sentences.translationEn: It connects the visitor to the roots of the place and its ancient authenticity.

sentences.arabic: وَهَكَذَا، فَإِنَّ السَّفَرَ لَيْسَ مُجَرَّدَ نُزْهَةٍ بَصَرِيَّةٍ عَابِرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Tako putovanje nije samo prolazna vizuelna šetnja.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, travel is not just a fleeting visual stroll.

sentences.arabic: بَلْ هُوَ غَوْصٌ فِي أَعْمَاقِ الْفِكْرِ الْبَشَرِيِّ الْمُبْدِعِ.
sentences.translation: Naprotiv, to je uranjanje u dubine kreativne ljudske misli.
sentences.translationEn: Rather, it is a dive into the depths of creative human thought.

sentences.arabic: تِلْكَ الصُّرُوحُ الْمِعْمَارِيَّةُ سَتَبْقَى دَائِمًا تَتَحَدَّى عَوَادِيَ الزَّمَنِ وَالنِّسْيَانِ.
sentences.translation: Ta arhitektonska zdanja će uvijek prkositi nedaćama vremena i zaborava.
sentences.translationEn: Those architectural edifices will always remain, defying the ravages of time and oblivion.
